forecast.name: Today
forecast.detailedForecast: Haze after 7am. Partly sunny, with a high near 89. Northwest wind 9 to 13 mph.

forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.detailedForecast: Haze. Mostly clear, with a low around 68. Northwest wind 3 to 10 mph.

weather_report:
As dawn unfolds over Boston, a gentle haze casts a soft veil across the skyline, wrapping the city in whispers of lingering warmth. The air carries a touch of stillness, hinting at the day ahead—a promise of partly sunny skies emerges, with temperatures expected to rise toward a comfortable embrace of nearly 89 degrees. A northwest wind dances lightly through the streets, stirring the scents of morning coffee and fresh pastries from nearby cafes.

As the sun attempts its ascent, the lingering haze gives way to a clearer vista later in the day, beckoning one outside with the allure of tranquil summer moments. With the warmth and slight breeze in play, more casual attire, perhaps a comfortable tee paired with breathable shorts, would keep one at ease. This is an ideal time to explore the winding trails of the Emerald Necklace or venture forth to a quiet corner of a local park with a good book in hand, enjoying the simple pleasures of the season under a brightening sky. As evening approaches, the haze will thicken again, lulling the city into a serene night with a low temperature around 68 degrees. 

Today is the kind of summer day that dances between the clarity and mystery of a warm July afternoon, inviting you to indulge in the gentle rhythm of life.
